_comment: Copy to config.json ONLY if you want to override the defaults. With no config.json you already get a sealed local fleet (loopback, no token). Environment variables (FLEETCHAT_BIND / FLEETCHAT_PORT / FLEETCHAT_TOKEN) override this file.
_networked_profile: To run across machines, set bind to 0.0.0.0 AND a token together -- the server refuses a non-loopback bind without one. Prefer the environment for the token so it never lands in a committed file: FLEETCHAT_BIND=0.0.0.0 FLEETCHAT_TOKEN=$(python -c 'import secrets;print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))'). See docs/SECURITY.md.
